reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.5.8: fixes the 0.5.7 hard crash (0xC0000409 in nvcuda64.dll). BatikBrew now marks GPU generation with a sentinel, detects a driver-level crash from the previous run, disables cuDNN autotune and TF32 on CUDA, and automatically falls back to CPU after repeated GPU crashes instead of closing the app.
